zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Stafford於1400年出生時，他的父親Humphrey Stafford16歲，母親Elizabeth Burdett16歲。他於1424年1月2日與Eleanor Aylesbury在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年6月7日在英國英格蘭肯特澤文亞可斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Stafford于1400年出生时，他的父亲Humphrey Stafford16岁，母亲Elizabeth Burdett16岁。他于1424年1月2日与Eleanor Aylesbury在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年6月7日在英国英格兰肯特澤文亞可斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Stafford was born in 1400, his father, Humphrey Stafford, was 16 and his mother, Elizabeth Burdett, was 16. He married Eleanor Aylesbury on 2 January 1424, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 7 June 1450, in Sevenoaks, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Stafford est né en 1400, son père, Humphrey Stafford, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Burdett, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Aylesbury le 2 janvier 1424, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 juin 1450, à Sevenoaks, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Stafford 1400 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Stafford 16 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Burdett 16. Er hat am 2. Januar 1424 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Aylesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Juni 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Sevenoaks, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford è nato il nel 1400, il suo padre, Humphrey Stafford, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Burdett, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Aylesbury il 2 gennaio 1424, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 giugno 1450, nel Sevenoaks, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Staffordが1400年に生まれた時，父Humphrey Staffordは16歳，母Elizabeth Burdettは16歳であった。1424年1月2日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでEleanor Aylesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年6月7日にイギリスイギリスケントセベノアクスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Stafford(이)가 1400년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Burdett(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1424년 1월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Eleanor Aylesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 6월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 세베노크스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford nasceu em 1400, seu pai, Humphrey Stafford, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Burdett, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Aylesbury em 2 de janeiro de 1424, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de junho de 1450, em Sevenoaks, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Stafford родился в 1400 г., его отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Burdett, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Aylesbury 2 января 1424 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 июня 1450 г. в местности сивеноакс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Stafford nació en 1400, su papá, Humphrey Stafford, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Burdett, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Eleanor Aylesbury el 2 de enero de 1424, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de junio de 1450, en Sevenoaks, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
